claim_text: HFEN aims to capture finer-grained features in MR image reconstructions using a Laplacian of Gaussian filter, although it is limited to assessing only high-frequency content.20 Several other common IQ metrics fall outside the scope of the perceptual IQ metrics studied in this work.
